news.paragraph: TLT faces potential downward pressure as a stronger April jobs report may delay Federal Reserve rate cuts and keep long-term yields in focus. The appointment of an interim Fed chair ahead of a leadership transition also introduces a layer of policy uncertainty for bond traders. While some seasonal setups are being discussed, recent headlines highlight negative sentiment and potential further weakness in the ETF.

headlines.title: Long-Term Yields Back In Spotlight: This Trade Bets On Further Weakness In TLT
